title: The Critic
description: An archetypal psychological fragment dedicated to judgment and evaluation

title: The Altruist
description: An archetypal psychological fragment dedicated to empathy and self-sacrifice

title: The Cynic
description: An archetypal psychological fragment dedicated to pessimistic realism

title: The Pragmatist
description: An archetypal psychological fragment dedicated to practical functionality

title: The Protagonist
description: The primary archetypal actor or central perspective in a narrative construction

title: The Antagonist
description: The primary archetypal opposing force against the central perspective in a narrative construction

title: Death
description: The archetypal anthropomorphic personification of mortality
